subcodes.first_line: O ye who survive the illustrious martyr! In truth, this bereavement is the cause of pain and anguish, for that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بازماندگان حضرت شهید مجید فی الحقیقه این ماتم مورث درد و الم است زیرا آن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for martyrs, @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
